mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.media_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, file_key, original_name, cdn_url, mime_type, file_size_bytes, width, height, alt_text, folder, created_at ) SELECT m.id, m.tenant, NOW(), m.file_key, m.original_name, m.cdn_url, m.mime_type, m.file_size_bytes, m.width, m.height, m.alt_text, m.folder, m.created_time FROM hm_cms.cms_media m
